2. consumer-electronics

REFERENCE
The 74HC595 is a high-speed, 8-bit serial-in, parallel-out shift register with three-state outputs. The SN74HC595N is a 16-pin integrated circuit (IC). It is a popular chip for extending the number of I/O pins on a microcontroller. The 74HC595 has three control pins:Serial data (SER): This pin receives the serial data that is to be shifted into the register.Clock (CLK): This pin is used to clock the serial data into the register.Latch (RCLK): This pin latches the data in the register, making it available on the output pins.The 74HC595 also has eight output pins, which can use to control extern ...
